name: createFromTemplate
description: Creates a new Google Document from an existing document template.

templateId.description: ID of the template document to copy from.

parentFolderId.description: ID of folder where document should be created. If not provided, creates in Drive root.

replacements.description: Key-value pairs for text replacements in the template (e.g., {"{{NAME}}": "John Doe", "{{DATE}}": "2024-01-01"}).
